journey.title: Your Journey to Certification
journey.subtitle: Follow our simple 5-step process to become a certified first aid professional.

step01.label: Step 01
step01.title: Enrolment
step01.description: Register online or with your nearest centre.

step02.label: Step 02
step02.title: Training
step02.description: Attend practical sessions with expert trainers.

step03.label: Step 03
step03.title: Assessment
step03.description: Demonstrate your skills in guided evaluations.

step04.label: Step 04
step04.title: Certificate
step04.description: Receive your recognised first aid certification.

step05.label: Step 05
step05.title: Placement
step05.description: Apply your skills in real-world roles and services.

whoWeAre.heading: St John Ambulance International Association
whoWeAre.body1: St John Ambulance International Association is a Non-Government International Organization u/s 8 of Companies under Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi (Government of India) Charity No. 114932 & CIN U85320HR2019NPL080345. The International Organization runs multi healthcare & first aid courses under International Module Certification issued country worldwide for Nation Paramount Mission 2030.
whoWeAre.body2: The International Organization is involved in multi services for worldwide areas e.g. First Aid Kit, Volunteer, Membership, Ambulance Service, Internship, Donation, Jobs & other teaching medical support first aid training and the provision of free ambulance services.
